---
id: disables-two-factor-authentication
title: "Disables two-factor authentication"
description: "Removes the TOTP secret, clears backup codes, and disables 2FA. Requires both the current password AND a valid TOTP code (or unused backup code)."
sidebar_label: "Disables two-factor authentication"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: docs/api/dawarich-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Disables two-factor authentication"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/v1/users/me/two_factor"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Removes the TOTP secret, clears backup codes, and disables 2FA. Requires both the current password AND a valid TOTP code (or unused backup code).

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
